title: Spicy Savory Russian Beef Dumplings
description: A spicy and savory Russian dish featuring fluffy dumplings filled with beef and soy sauce, perfect for a lazy Sunday
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper
In a separate bowl, whisk together the ground beef, onion, garlic, and soy sauce
Add the egg to the beef mixture and whisk until just combined
Gradually add the flour mixture to the beef mixture and whisk until a dough forms
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic
Divide the dough into 20 equal pieces and roll each into a ball
Flatten each ball into a disk and place a tablespoon of the beef mixture in the center
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the dumpling
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10 minutes
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F.
